task_completion.description: Agent selects 'Hidden VeraCrypt volume' in the Volume Creation Wizard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard window is open, and the 'Hidden VeraCrypt volume' radio button is selected.

task_completion.description: Agent generates a random keyfile using VeraCrypt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Keyfile Generator window is visible, showing mouse movements for entropy and saving the file to /home/ga/Keyfiles/investigation.key.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the outer volume with the correct settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Wizard screens show the outer volume configured with AES-Twofish-Serpent encryption, SHA-512 hash, and 100 MB size.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the hidden volume with the correct settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Wizard screens show the hidden volume configured with Serpent encryption, Whirlpool hash, 40 MB size, and the use of a keyfile.

task_completion.description: Agent copies decoy files into the mounted outer volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal shows the 3 decoy files (e.g., Q3_2024_Financial_Summary.txt) being copied to or present in the mounted outer volume (e.g., /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1).

task_completion.description: Agent copies sensitive files into the mounted hidden volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal shows the 4 sensitive files (e.g., Internal_Investigation_Report_2024.txt) being copied to or present in the mounted hidden volume.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the verification report with SHA-256 hashes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of /home/ga/Documents/archive_setup_report.txt containing file names and SHA-256 hashes for both compartments.

task_completion.description: Agent dismounts all volumes at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window shows no mounted volumes in any of the slots at the end of the trajectory.

integrity.description: Agent used the VeraCrypt GUI wizard to create the hidden volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the VeraCrypt GUI Volume Creation Wizard being used. The CLI does not support hidden volume creation, so any attempt to do this entirely via terminal commands is invalid.

integrity.description: Agent actually copied the source files rather than creating empty dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like cp) or file manager actions should show copying from /home/ga/Documents/decoy_files/ and /home/ga/Documents/sensitive_files/ to the mount points.

integrity.description: Agent generated genuine SHA-256 hashes for the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal should show the agent running 'sha256sum' on the files to generate the hashes for the report, rather than hallucinating them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Outer volume must use AES-Twofish-Serpent encryption, SHA-512 hash, 100 MB size, password 'AuditReady2024!'. Hidden volume must use Serpent encryption, Whirlpool hash, 40 MB size, password 'InvestigationX!99', and a keyfile at /home/ga/Keyfiles/investigation.key. Decoy files to copy: Q3_2024_Financial_Summary.txt, Employee_Directory_2024.csv, IT_Procurement_Policy_v3.txt. Sensitive files to copy: Internal_Investigation_Report_2024.txt, Whistleblower_Testimony_Sealed.txt, Evidence_Chain_of_Custody.csv, Legal_Hold_Notice_Privileged.txt. The VeraCrypt CLI does not support hidden volume creation; the GUI wizard must be used.
